heading: Appointment of experts
label: 142 Appointment of experts
text: For the purpose of carrying on the work prescribed by , the Archivist, without regard to the Classification Act of 1949 and the civil service laws and regulations thereunder, may engage the services, either in or outside of the District of Columbia, of not to exceed five historical experts who are especially informed on the various phases of the territorial history of the United States and are especially qualified for the editorial work necessary in arranging such territorial papers for publication.section 141 of this title
notes: References in TextThe Classification Act of 1949, referred to in text, is , , which was repealed by , , , and reenacted by the first section thereof as chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.act Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 78263 Stat. 954Pub.
